action.reasoning: Observation: Resumed training for 4 epochs with LR=5e-5 led to val RMSE starting at 454.5 then down to 441.46 (eval 440.82), worse than prior best 436.52 val / 436.74 test. Loss curve shows continued decrease but no generalization gain. Analysis: New optimizer state and continued training degraded performance (no immediate val compute post-resume); low time left (~3min) prevents further training (prior 4-epoch run ~18min). Model (~48M params) and lat-weighted loss are solid but architecture may benefit from spectral methods (e.g. torch-harmonics) in future. Decision: Time budget critical, end experiment now with best submitted rmse_z500=436.74 from iter 8.
action.done_reason: Time budget nearly exhausted (3min left); no further improvements possible without timeout risk; best submitted score is 436.74
